abilities.name: Bang! Bang! Bang!
abilities.text:
Friendly Gnorcs within 9" of Gnorc Big Drummer add +2 to all Attack Dice Rolls. Friendly non-Gnorc small monsters add +1 to all Attack Dice Rolls.

If a monster is affected by this aura from multiple Gnorc Big Drummers, add +1 for every subsequent drummer (instead of +2).

abilities.name: BANG! BANG! BANG!
abilities.text:
As long as Gnorc Big Drummer is alive, all friendly Gnorc and Small monsters add +2 to all Attack Dice Rolls until the end of the round.

If a monster is affected by this aura from multiple Gnorc Big Drummers, add +1 for every subsequent drummer (instead of +2).

When activated, this replaces Bang! Bang! Bang! until the end of the round. This ability can only be used once per Gnorc Big Drummer per round.
